# terrible_community_general_apache2_mod_proxy (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `balancer_vhost` (String) (IPv4|IPv6|FQDN):port of the Apache httpd 2.4 mod_proxy balancer pool.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `balancer_url_suffix` (String) Suffix of the balancer pool URL required to access the balancer pool status page (for example `balancer_vhost[:port]/balancer_url_suffix`).
- `member_host` (String) (IPv4|IPv6|FQDN) of the balancer member to get or to set attributes to. Port number is autodetected and should not be specified here. If undefined, the `community.general.apache2_mod_proxy` module returns a members list of dictionaries of all the current balancer pool members' attributes.
- `state` (String) Desired state of the member host. States can be simultaneously invoked by separating them with a comma (for example `state=drained,ignore_errors`), but it is recommended to specify them as a proper YAML list. States `present` and `absent` must be used without any other state.
- `tls` (Boolean) Use https to access balancer management page.
- `validate_certs` (Boolean) Validate ssl/tls certificates.

### Read-Only

- `member` (String) Specific balancer member information dictionary, returned when the module is invoked with `member_host` parameter.
- `members` (String) List of member (defined above) dictionaries, returned when the module is invoked with no `member_host` and `state` args.
